locking.title: Select Locking Mechanism
locking.description: There are four different locking mechanism variations to choose from. Depending on structural conditions and individual preferences, AquaLOCK® doors offer multiple configurations. With the exception of version V2 (protection height up to handle, max. 1,600 mm), all variants provide flood protection up to 5,000 mm.

options.V1: Outside: No door fittings, no locking cylinder. Inside: Locking cylinder, lever handle and espagnolette bolt.
options.V2: Outside: Locking cylinder and lever handle. Inside: Locking cylinder, lever handle and espagnolette bolt.
options.V3: Outside: Locking cylinder with waterproof cover, fixed knob. Inside: Locking cylinder, lever handle and espagnolette bolt.
options.V6: Outside: Locking cylinder, fixed knob and espagnolette bolt. Inside: Locking cylinder, lever handle and espagnolette bolt.

details.V1:
Burglary Protection: RC1N, RC2, RC3 possible
Glass Cut-Out: Not possible
details.V2:
Burglary Protection: RC1N, RC2, RC3 possible
Glass Cut-Out: Only possible with RC1N, espagnolette bolt visible from outside
details.V3:
Burglary Protection: Only RC1N possible
Glass Cut-Out: Not possible
details.V6:
Burglary Protection: Only RC1N possible
Glass Cut-Out: Possible, espagnolette bolt visible from outside

dimensions.title: Door Dimensions
dimensions.description:
Please note the permissible width and height of the door:
Width: between 500 and 1,200 mm
Height: between 1,200 and 2,300 mm
dimensions.widthError: Width must be between 500 and 1210 mm
dimensions.heightError: Height must be between 1200 and 2300 mm
dimensions.extra: Larger widths are available on request.

panels.title: Optional Fixed Panels
panels.description: Wider door openings can be compensated with fixed panels mounted on the frame to the left, right, and above the door:
panels.left: Fixed side panel up to 400 mm, left
panels.right: Fixed side panel up to 400 mm, right
panels.top: Fixed panel above the door, up to 400 mm
panels.extra: Larger widths are available on request.

installation.title: Installation Type
installation.description:
If you are unsure which installation type is suitable for your building, no problem — this will be clarified by an experienced technician on site.
Attention: Depending on the installation type, thermally insulated doors may not be possible.

infront_reveal.label: In Front of the Reveal
infront_reveal.desc: Thermally insulated not possible. Drip cap mandatory!

included.title: Included by default
included.description: In this door configuration, the assembly kit is mandatory and automatically added.

insulation.title: Thermal Insulation
insulation.description:
Thermally insulated AquaLOCK® doors – efficient protection against heat and cold.

The German Energy Saving Ordinance (EnEV) requires front doors to have a maximum Ud value of 1.8 W/m²K.

AquaLOCK® thermally insulated doors achieve Ud 1.5 W/m²K, keeping warmth inside and cold outside.

Non-thermally insulated doors are recommended for secondary doors such as basements or garages.

windows.title: Windows
windows.description:
A non-opening window (max 650 × 450 mm) can be integrated in the upper door area.

• Thermally insulated doors → triple glazing
• Non-insulated doors → double glazing
windows.warning: Windows are not flood-resistant and are not suitable for doors requiring full-height flood protection.
windows.samePrice: Available in 3 variants, all at the same price.
windows.v3Warning: Windows are not available for V3.

flood.title: Flood Protection
flood.description: The reinforced version provides protection up to 5 m water level.
flood.option: Reinforced version with flood protection up to 5 m
flood.disabledNote: Flood protection is not available with windows.

colors.title: Plenty of Colours
colors.description:
In order for your AquaLOCK® door to perfectly match your building, you have a choice of 216 RAL colours.
Seven standard colours (white, black and several shades of grey) are available at no extra charge.

Please Note: The colour shades on the website may differ from the actual colour due to monitor display and therefore, we offer no guarantee for an exact match.
colors.standard: This is a standard colour and carries no extra charge.
colors.extra: Selected colour is a non-standard RAL colour and incurs an extra charge of €{price}.

fittings.title: Door Fittings
fittings.description: Door fittings are based on the locking mechanism selected earlier.

panic_function_e.label: Panic Function E
panic_function_e.desc: For fixed knob outside. Opens only with key when espagnolette is open.

pushbar.label: Pushbar
pushbar.desc: Enables fast exit, bar-style mechanism on inside.

drip.title: Drip Cap
drip.option: Drip cap mounted on top of the frame

burglary.title: Burglary Protection
burglary.restriction: RC2 and RC3 are only available for V1 and V2 without window.
